    // ==========================================
    // CHAT & INBOX SYSTEM
    // ==========================================
    function loadInbox() {
        const inboxList = document.getElementById("inbox-list-container");
        db.collection("chats").where("participants", "array-contains", currentUser.uid)
          .onSnapshot(async snap => {
            if(snap.empty) return inboxList.innerHTML = "<p style='text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:20px;'>No messages found.</p>";
            
            let chatDocs = [];
            snap.forEach(doc => chatDocs.push({ id: doc.id, data: doc.data() }));

            chatDocs.sort((a, b) => {
                const tA = a.data.lastMessageTime ? a.data.lastMessageTime.toMillis() : 0;
                const tB = b.data.lastMessageTime ? b.data.lastMessageTime.toMillis() : 0;
                return tB - tA;
            });

            const promises = chatDocs.map(async item => {
                const chat = item.data;
                const otherUid = chat.participants.find(id => id !== currentUser.uid);
                
                const otherDoc = await db.collection("users").doc(otherUid).get();
                if(otherDoc.exists) {
                    const oUser = otherDoc.data();
                    let badge = (chat.status === "pending" && chat.sender !== currentUser.uid) ? "<span class='badge'>Request</span>" : "";
                    let safeName = oUser.name.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
                    let verifiedBadge = getVerifiedBadge(oUser.isVerified);
                    
                    const isOnline = oUser.status === "Online";
                    const dotHtml = isOnline ? `<div class="online-dot"></div>` : "";
                    
                    return `
                    <div class="inbox-item" id="inbox-chat-${item.id}">
                        <div class="avatar-container" onclick="openChat('${item.id}', '${otherUid}', '${safeName}', '${oUser.photo || ''}')">
                            <img src="${oUser.photo || 'https://via.placeholder.com/150'}">
                            ${dotHtml}
                        </div>
                        <div class="info" onclick="openChat('${item.id}', '${otherUid}', '${safeName}', '${oUser.photo || ''}')">
                            <h4>${oUser.name}${verifiedBadge} ${badge}</h4>
                            <p>${chat.lastMessage || "No messages"}</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>`;
                }
                return "";
            });

            const htmlArray = await Promise.all(promises);
            inboxList.innerHTML = htmlArray.join("");

            setTimeout(() => {
                chatDocs.forEach(item => {
                    const el = document.getElementById(`inbox-chat-${item.id}`);
                    if(el) {
                        addLongPressListener(el, () => {
                            showPopupModal(`
                                <div class="popup-item danger" onclick="deleteChat('${item.id}'); closePopupModal();">
                                    <i class="fa-solid fa-trash"></i> Delete Chat
                                </div>
                            `);
                        });
                    }
                });
            }, 500);
        });
    }

    async function deleteChat(chatId) {
        if(!chatId) return;
        try {
            await db.collection("chats").doc(chatId).delete();
            showToast("Chat deleted!");
        } catch(e) { showToast("Failed to delete chat."); }
    }
    function updateChatHeaderStatus() {
        const statusEl = document.getElementById("chat-user-status");
        if(currentChatDocData && currentChatDocData.typing && currentChatDocData.typing[chatTargetUid]) {
            statusEl.innerText = "typing...";
            statusEl.className = "chat-status typing";
        } else {
            if(targetUserPresenceStatus === "Online") {
                statusEl.innerText = "Online";
                statusEl.className = "chat-status online";
            } else {
                if (targetLastSeen) {
                    const dateStr = targetLastSeen.toLocaleDateString([], { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
                    const timeStr = targetLastSeen.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit' });
                    
                    const today = new Date();
                    if (targetLastSeen.getDate() === today.getDate() && targetLastSeen.getMonth() === today.getMonth() && targetLastSeen.getFullYear() === today.getFullYear()) {
                        statusEl.innerText = `Last seen today at ${timeStr}`;
                    } else {
                        statusEl.innerText = `Last seen on ${dateStr} at ${timeStr}`;
                    }
                } else {
                    statusEl.innerText = "Offline";
                }
                statusEl.className = "chat-status";
            }
        }
    }

    function openChat(chatId, targetUid, targetName, targetPhoto) {
        currentChatId = chatId; chatTargetUid = targetUid;
        
        db.collection('users').doc(targetUid).get().then(doc => {
            const isV = doc.exists ? doc.data().isVerified : false;
            document.getElementById("chat-user-name").innerHTML = `${targetName}${getVerifiedBadge(isV)}`;
        });

        document.getElementById("chat-user-pic").src = targetPhoto || "https://via.placeholder.com/150";
        openScreen("chat-screen");

        if(targetUserPresenceUnsubscribe) targetUserPresenceUnsubscribe();
        targetUserPresenceUnsubscribe = db.collection("users").doc(targetUid).onSnapshot(doc => {
            if(doc.exists) {
                const data = doc.data();
                targetUserPresenceStatus = data.status || "Offline";
                targetLastSeen = data.lastSeen ? data.lastSeen.toDate() : null;
                updateChatHeaderStatus();
            }
        });

        if(chatStatusUnsubscribe) chatStatusUnsubscribe();
        chatStatusUnsubscribe = db.collection("chats").doc(chatId).onSnapshot(doc => {
            if(!doc.exists) return;
            currentChatDocData = doc.data();
            updateChatHeaderStatus();

            const chatInfo = doc.data();
            const dBox = document.getElementById("chat-decision-box");
            const iBox = document.getElementById("chat-input-container");
            const pBox = document.getElementById("chat-pending-box");
            
            if(chatInfo.status === "pending") {
                if(chatInfo.sender !== currentUser.uid) { dBox.style.display = "flex"; iBox.style.display = "none"; pBox.style.display = "none"; } 
                else { dBox.style.display = "none"; iBox.style.display = "none"; pBox.style.display = "block"; }
            } else if(chatInfo.status === "accepted") {
                dBox.style.display = "none"; iBox.style.display = "flex"; pBox.style.display = "none";
            }
        });

        const msgContainer = document.getElementById("chat-messages-container");
        msgContainer.innerHTML = "";
        if(messagesUnsubscribe) messagesUnsubscribe();
        messagesUnsubscribe = db.collection("chats").doc(chatId).collection("messages").orderBy("timestamp", "asc").onSnapshot(snap => {
            msgContainer.innerHTML = "";
            snap.forEach(doc => {
                const msg = doc.data();
                const div = document.createElement("div");
                div.className = `msg-bubble ${msg.senderId === currentUser.uid ? 'msg-sent' : 'msg-received'}`;
                div.id = `msg-${doc.id}`;
                
                let replyHtml = "";
                if(msg.replyToText) {
                    replyHtml = `<div class="quoted-msg">${msg.replyToText.length > 50 ? msg.replyToText.substring(0,50)+'...' : msg.replyToText}</div>`;
                }

                let timeString = "";
                if(msg.timestamp) {
                    const d = msg.timestamp.toDate();
                    timeString = d.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour: '2-digit', minute:'2-digit'});
                } else {
                    timeString = "Just now";
                }

                let reactionHtml = '';
                if(msg.reactions) {
                    const emojis = Object.values(msg.reactions);
                    if(emojis.length > 0) {
                        const uniqueEmojis = [...new Set(emojis)];
                        reactionHtml = `<div class="msg-reactions">${uniqueEmojis.join('')}</div>`;
                    }
                }

                if (msg.type === "shared_post") {
                    div.classList.add('shared-post-bubble');
                    div.innerHTML = `
                        <div onclick="viewSharedPost('${msg.mediaUrl}', '${msg.postType}')">
                            ${msg.postType === 'video' 
                                ? `<div style="position:relative"><video src="${msg.mediaUrl}"></video><i class="fa-solid fa-play play-icon"></i></div>` 
                                : `<img src="${msg.mediaUrl}">`
                            }
                            <p style="font-size:12px; margin-top:5px; font-weight: 500;"><i class="fa-solid fa-link"></i> View Post</p>
                            <span class="msg-time">${timeString}</span>
                            ${reactionHtml}
                        </div>
                    `;
                } else if (msg.type === "image") {
                    div.innerHTML = `
                        <img src="${msg.mediaUrl}" class="chat-img-attachment" onclick="viewSharedPost('${msg.mediaUrl}', 'image')">
                        <span class="msg-time">${timeString}</span>
                        ${reactionHtml}
                    `;
                } else {
                    let finalFormattedText = formatMessageText(msg.text);
                    div.innerHTML = `${replyHtml}<span>${finalFormattedText}</span><span class="msg-time">${timeString}</span>${reactionHtml}`;
                }
                
                msgContainer.appendChild(div);

                addLongPressListener(div, () => {
                    let safeTextForCopy = msg.text ? msg.text.replace(/'/g, "\\'").replace(/"/g, """) : "";
                    let emojiArray = ['👍','🥰','😂','😡','😭','😜','🙂','❤️'];
                    
                    let popupHtml = `<div class="popup-reaction-row">`;
                    emojiArray.forEach(emo => {
                        popupHtml += `<span onclick="addChatReaction('${doc.id}', '${emo}'); closePopupModal();">${emo}</span>`;
                    });
                    popupHtml += `</div>`;

                    popupHtml += `
                        <div class="popup-item" onclick="prepareReply('${msg.text ? msg.text.replace(/'/g, "\\'") : (msg.type==='image'?'Image':'Post')}'); closePopupModal();">

    function startOfflineDownload() {
        if(!currentSharePostMediaUrl || currentSharePostType !== 'video') return showToast("Only videos can be downloaded!");
        
        const btn = document.getElementById('download-offline-btn');
        const progressContainer = document.getElementById('download-progress-bar');
        const progressFill = document.getElementById('download-progress-fill');
        const progressText = document.getElementById('download-progress-text');

        btn.style.display = 'none';
        progressContainer.style.display = 'block';

        const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.open('GET', currentSharePostMediaUrl, true);
        xhr.responseType = 'blob';

        xhr.onprogress = function(e) {
            if (e.lengthComputable) {
                const percentComplete = Math.round((e.loaded / e.total) * 100);
                progressFill.style.width = percentComplete + '%';
                progressText.innerText = percentComplete + '% Downloaded';
            }
        };

        xhr.onload = function() {
            if (xhr.status === 200 || xhr.status === 0) {
                const blob = xhr.response;
                const postData = allPostsCache.find(p => p.id === currentSharePostId)?.data;
                
                if(!offlineDB) return showToast("Database error!");
                const tx = offlineDB.transaction(['videos'], 'readwrite');
                const store = tx.objectStore('videos');
                store.put({
                    id: currentSharePostId,
                    blob: blob,
                    authorName: postData?.authorName || 'Anonymous',
                    authorPhoto: postData?.authorPhoto || 'https://via.placeholder.com/150',
                    description: postData?.description || '',
                    timestamp: Date.now()
                });

                tx.oncomplete = () => {
                    progressText.innerText = "100% Download Complete!";
                    showToast("Video saved for offline!");
                    setTimeout(() => closeShareSheet(false), 1500);
                };
                tx.onerror = () => {
                    progressText.innerText = "Error saving to DB";
                    setTimeout(() => closeShareSheet(false), 2000);
                };

            } else {
                progressText.innerText = "Failed to download. (CORS/Network)";
                setTimeout(() => { closeShareSheet(false); }, 2000);
            }
        };
        xhr.onerror = function() {
            progressText.innerText = "Network Error!";
            setTimeout(() => { closeShareSheet(false); }, 2000);
        };
        xhr.send();
    }

    function openOfflineVideosScreen() {

            }

            let html = "";
            videos.sort((a,b) => b.timestamp - a.timestamp);

                    <video id="vid-offline-${v.id}" class="reel-video" src="${vidUrl}" playsinline loop preload="auto" fetchpriority="high"

    function initOfflineReelsObserver() {
        if(offlineReelsObserver) offlineReelsObserver.disconnect();
        const reelSection = document.getElementById('offline-reels-container');
        
        offlineReelsObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
            entries.forEach(entry => {
                const vid = entry.target.querySelector('video');
                const postId = entry.target.id.replace('offline-reel-', 'offline-');
                const icon = document.getElementById(`reel-play-icon-${postId}`);
                
                if(entry.isIntersecting) {
                    if(!isAudioEnabled) vid.muted = true; else vid.muted = false;
                    let playPromise = vid.play();
                    if(playPromise !== undefined) {
                        playPromise.then(() => {
                            if(icon) icon.classList.remove('show');
                            if(!isAudioEnabled) vid.muted = true; else vid.muted = false;
                        }).catch(e => {
                            vid.muted = true;
                            vid.play().catch(err=>{});
                        });
                    }
                } else {
                    vid.pause();
                    vid.currentTime = 0; 
                    if(icon) icon.classList.remove('show');
                }
            });
        }, { root: reelSection, threshold: 0.6 });
        
        document.querySelectorAll('#offline-reels-container .reel-card').forEach(card => offlineReelsObserver.observe(card));
    }


    function loadShareList() {
        const shareList = document.getElementById("share-list-container");
        shareList.innerHTML = "<p style='text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:20px;'><div class='custom-spinner' style='width: 30px; height: 30px; margin: auto;'></div></p>";

        db.collection("chats").where("participants", "array-contains", currentUser.uid).get().then(async snap => {
            if(snap.empty) return shareList.innerHTML = "<p style='text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:20px;'>No friends in inbox.</p>";
            
            let chatDocs = [];
            snap.forEach(doc => chatDocs.push({ id: doc.id, data: doc.data() }));

            const promises = chatDocs.map(async item => {
                const chat = item.data;
                const otherUid = chat.participants.find(id => id !== currentUser.uid);
                
                const otherDoc = await db.collection("users").doc(otherUid).get();
                if(otherDoc.exists) {
                    const oUser = otherDoc.data();
                    if(chat.status === "pending") return ""; 
                    const vBadge = getVerifiedBadge(oUser.isVerified);

                    return `
                    <div class="inbox-item" style="cursor:default;">
                        <img src="${oUser.photo || 'https://via.placeholder.com/150'}">
                        <div class="info">
                            <h4>${oUser.name}${vBadge}</h4>
                        </div>
                        <button class="share-btn-small" onclick="sendSharedPost('${item.id}')">Send <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i></button>
                    </div>`;
                }
                return "";
            });

            const htmlArray = await Promise.all(promises);
            const finalHtml = htmlArray.join("");
            if(finalHtml === "") shareList.innerHTML = "<p style='text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:20px;'>No friends to share with.</p>";
            else shareList.innerHTML = finalHtml;
        });
    }

    function handleSearchInput() {
        const val = document.getElementById('search-input').value.toLowerCase().trim();
        const sugDiv = document.getElementById('search-suggestions');
        const resDiv = document.getElementById('search-results');
        
        if(!val) { 
            sugDiv.innerHTML = ''; 
            resDiv.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:20px; font-size:14px;"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i> Type to search</p>';
            return; 
        }

        let matches = new Set();
        if(val.startsWith('#')) {
            const tagVal = val.substring(1);
            hashtagsCache.forEach(h => { if(h.id.includes(tagVal)) matches.add(`#${h.id}`); });
        }

        allPostsCache.forEach(post => {
            if(post.data.description && post.data.description.toLowerCase().includes(val)) {
                matches.add(post.data.description.length > 40 ? post.data.description.substring(0, 40) + "..." : post.data.description);
            }
        });

        let html = '';
        Array.from(matches).slice(0, 10).forEach(m => {
            let safeM = m.replace(/'/g, "\\'");
            html += `<div class="sug-item" onclick="executeSearch('${safeM}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass"></i> ${m}</div>`;
        });
        
        if(html === '') html = `<div class="sug-item" style="color:var(--text-muted);"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i> No matches found!</div>`;
        sugDiv.innerHTML = html;
    }

    function executeSearch(query) {
        document.getElementById('search-input').value = query;
        document.getElementById('search-suggestions').innerHTML = '';
        const resDiv = document.getElementById('search-results');
        resDiv.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top: 20px;"><div class="custom-spinner" style="width: 30px; height: 30px; margin: auto;"></div> Searching...</p>';

        let html = '';
        allPostsCache.forEach(post => {
            if(post.data.description && post.data.description.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())) {
                html += createPostHTML(post.data, post.id, false, 'src');
            }
        });

        if(html === '') html = '<p style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top: 20px;">No posts found!</p>';
        resDiv.innerHTML = html;
    }

    async function toggleCommentLike(postId, commentId, btnEl) {
        const span = btnEl.querySelector('span');
        let count = span.innerText ? parseInt(span.innerText) : 0;
        const isLiked = btnEl.classList.contains('liked');

        if(isLiked) {
            btnEl.classList.remove('liked');
            count = Math.max(0, count - 1);
        } else {
            btnEl.classList.add('liked');
            count++;
        }
        span.innerText = count > 0 ? count : '';

        try {
            const ref = db.collection("posts").doc(postId).collection("comments").doc(commentId);
            if (isLiked) {
                await ref.update({ likedBy: firebase.firestore.FieldValue.arrayRemove(currentUser.uid) });
            } else {
                await ref.update({ likedBy: firebase.firestore.FieldValue.arrayUnion(currentUser.uid) });
            }
        } catch(e) {
            console.error("Like update failed:", e);
        }
    }

        if(input.files && input.files[0]) {
            selectedBannerFile = input.files[0];
            document.getElementById('edit-banner-preview').style.backgroundImage = `url(${URL.createObjectURL(selectedBannerFile)})`;
        }
    }

    async function updateProfile() {
        if(isUserSuspended) return showToast("Account Not Found");
        const name = document.getElementById('edit-name').value || currentUser.displayName;
        const bio = document.getElementById('edit-bio').value || "";
        
        if(name.length > 23) return showToast("Name max 23 chars!");
        if(bio.length > 90) return showToast("Bio max 90 chars!");
        
        const btn = document.getElementById('prof-save-btn');
        const status = document.getElementById('prof-status');
        btn.disabled = true;
        
        let photoUrl = currentUser.photoURL;
        let bannerUrl = currentUserData?.banner || ""; 

        if(selectedProfileFile) {
            status.innerText = "Uploading profile image...";
            const uploadedUrl = await uploadToImgBB(selectedProfileFile);
            if(uploadedUrl) photoUrl = uploadedUrl;
            else { showToast("Failed to upload profile image"); btn.disabled = false; status.innerText = ""; return; }
        }

        if(selectedBannerFile) {
            status.innerText = "Uploading banner image...";
            const uploadedUrl = await uploadToImgBB(selectedBannerFile);
            if(uploadedUrl) bannerUrl = uploadedUrl;
            else { showToast("Failed to upload banner image"); btn.disabled = false; status.innerText = ""; return; }
        }
        
        try {
            status.innerText = "Saving profile...";
            await currentUser.updateProfile({ displayName: name, photoURL: photoUrl });
            
            await db.collection("users").doc(currentUser.uid).update({ 
                name: name, 
                photo: photoUrl,
                bio: bio,
                banner: bannerUrl
            });
            
            status.innerText = "Updating old posts...";
            const postsSnapshot = await db.collection("posts").where("uid", "==", currentUser.uid).get();
            if(!postsSnapshot.empty) {
                const batch = db.batch();
                postsSnapshot.forEach(doc => {
                    batch.update(doc.ref, { authorName: name, authorPhoto: photoUrl });
                });
                await batch.commit(); 
            }

            updateLocalAccountDetails({ email: currentUser.email, displayName: name, photoURL: photoUrl });

            showToast("Profile Updated Successfully!"); 
            closeScreen(); 
            loadMyProfile(); 
        } catch (error) {
            showToast("Error updating profile");
        } finally {
            btn.disabled = false; 
            status.innerText = ""; 
            selectedProfileFile = null; 
            selectedBannerFile = null; 
        }
    }

    // ==========================================
    // UPLOAD & MEDIA POSTING
    // ==========================================
    async function deletePost(postId) { 
        if(confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this post?")) { 
            await db.collection("posts").doc(postId).delete(); showToast("Post Deleted!"); 
            closeScreen();
        } 
    }

    function handleVideoPreview(input) { 
        if(input.files[0]) {
            document.getElementById('file-name').innerText = input.files[0].name; 
            const preview = document.getElementById('upload-video-preview');
            preview.src = URL.createObjectURL(input.files[0]);
            preview.style.display = "block";
            document.getElementById('upload-box-ui').style.display = "none";
        } 
    }

    async function uploadVideoPost() {
        if(isUserSuspended) return showToast("Account Not Found");
        const fileInput = document.getElementById("video-file");
        const desc = document.getElementById("video-desc").value;
        const status = document.getElementById("vid-status");
        const btn = document.getElementById("vid-upload-btn");
        const file = fileInput.files[0];

        if (!file) return showToast("Select a video!");
        btn.disabled = true; document.getElementById("progress-container").style.display = "block"; status.innerText = "Uploading...";

        const formData = new FormData(); formData.append("file", file); formData.append("upload_preset", UPLOAD_PRESET);
        const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.open("POST", `https://api.cloudinary.com/v1_1/${CLOUD_NAME}/video/upload`);

        xhr.upload.addEventListener("progress", (e) => {
            if (e.lengthComputable) {
                const percent = Math.round((e.loaded / e.total) * 100);
                document.getElementById("progress-bar").style.width = percent + "%";
                status.innerText = `Uploading... ${percent}%`;
            }
        });

        xhr.onload = async () => {
            if (xhr.status === 200) {
                const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);
                
                let optimizedUrl = data.secure_url.replace("/upload/", "/upload/q_auto,f_auto,w_720,c_limit/");
                
                await db.collection("posts").add({ 
                    uid: currentUser.uid, authorName: currentUser.displayName, authorPhoto: currentUser.photoURL, 
                    authorVerified: currentUserData?.isVerified || false, type: "video", mediaUrl: optimizedUrl, description: desc, tags: [], likedBy: [], viewedBy: [], timestamp: firebase.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp() 
                });
                
                await extractAndSaveHashtags(desc);

                showToast("Video Posted!"); closeScreen();
                document.getElementById("progress-container").style.display = "none";
                document.getElementById("progress-bar").style.width = "0%";
                fileInput.value = ""; document.getElementById('file-name').innerText = "Tap here to choose from gallery";
                document.getElementById('video-desc').value = ""; btn.disabled = false;
                
                document.getElementById('upload-video-preview').style.display = "none";
                document.getElementById('upload-video-preview').src = "";
                document.getElementById('upload-box-ui').style.display = "flex";
                status.innerText = "";

                switchTab('home', document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item')[0]);
            } else { showToast("Upload Failed!"); btn.disabled = false; status.innerText = ""; document.getElementById("progress-container").style.display = "none";}
        };
        xhr.send(formData);
    }

    let selectedPostImageFile = null;
    function handleImagePreview(input) {
        if(input.files && input.files[0]) {
            selectedPostImageFile = input.files[0];
            document.getElementById('img-file-name').innerText = input.files[0].name;
            const preview = document.getElementById('img-preview');
            preview.src = URL.createObjectURL(selectedPostImageFile);
            preview.style.display = "block";
            document.getElementById('img-upload-box-ui').style.display = "none";
        }
    }

    async function uploadImagePost() {
        if(isUserSuspended) return showToast("Account Not Found");
        if (!selectedPostImageFile) return showToast("Select an image from gallery!");
        const desc = document.getElementById("image-desc").value;
        const btn = document.getElementById("img-upload-btn");
        const status = document.getElementById("img-status");
        
        btn.disabled = true; status.innerText = "Uploading Image...";
        const imgUrl = await uploadToImgBB(selectedPostImageFile);

        if(!imgUrl) { showToast("Upload Failed! Check API Key."); btn.disabled = false; status.innerText = ""; return; }

        status.innerText = "Posting...";
        try {
            await db.collection("posts").add({ 
                uid: currentUser.uid, authorName: currentUser.displayName, authorPhoto: currentUser.photoURL, 
                authorVerified: currentUserData?.isVerified || false, type: "image", mediaUrl: imgUrl, description: desc, tags: [], likedBy: [], viewedBy: [], timestamp: firebase.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp() 
            });
            await extractAndSaveHashtags(desc);
            showToast("Image Posted!"); closeScreen();
            
            selectedPostImageFile = null; document.getElementById("image-file").value = "";
            document.getElementById("image-desc").value = ""; document.getElementById('img-preview').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('img-preview').src = ''; document.getElementById('img-upload-box-ui').style.display = "flex";
            document.getElementById('img-file-name').innerText = "Tap here to choose from gallery"; status.innerText = "";
            
            btn.disabled = false; switchTab('home', document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item')[0]);
        } catch (error) { 
            showToast("Error Posting!"); btn.disabled = false; status.innerText = "";
        }
    }
</script>
